next_action: Launch a 3-branch portfolio targeting submission bundle parity (primary), prior calibration refinement (hedge), and probe-head class-count diagnostic (explore). Do not submit.
root_cause: The perch cached-probe baseline achieved val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.665 but submission bundle parity is not yet validated. The submission bar guidance explicitly requires multi-round iteration before consuming daily quota. The current state is round 1 of the expected iteration cycle.
why: Three factors block immediate submission: (1) the CPU-only, internet-off bundle has not been dry-run locally, (2) the submission bar requires at least calibration and ensemble iteration beyond the raw baseline, and (3) open questions about fitted_class_count vs active_class_count remain unresolved. The veto checker blocks class_coverage axes, and the branch diversifier recommends backbone/probe_head/prior_calibration as the viable mix. Collapsing to a single low-information calibration sweep would waste branch budget when the bundle pipeline itself is unvalidated.
next_title: Perch cached-probe round 2: bundle parity + calibration + diagnostic
portfolio_intent: Validate submission pipeline readiness while parallel-testing calibration improvement and resolving class-count uncertainty. Do not consume daily quota until bundle dry-run passes.

portfolio_policy.submission_barrier: round 2 of multi-round cycle — do not submit

branch_mix.rationale: Submission bundle parity is the single blocking task per all adopt-now cards.
Test anchor-based calibration to close 0.662→0.665 gap. Conditional policy awaiting evidence.
Resolve fitted vs active class count open question. Low cost, high diagnostic value.

branch_portfolio.title: Bundle parity: CPU-only submission dry-run
branch_portfolio.hypothesis: Packaging the Perch embedding cache + linear probe + Bayesian prior into a CPU-only, internet-off notebook will reproduce val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.665 within tolerance.
branch_portfolio.rationale: Adopt-now card explicitly identifies this as the single blocking task. Without validated bundle parity, no Kaggle submission is safe.
branch_portfolio.falsification_criterion: Dry-run prediction checksum does not match local run-0001 predictions within 1e-6 tolerance.
branch_portfolio.kill_criterion: Bundle fails to run within 90-minute CPU limit or produces empty submission CSV.

branch_portfolio.title: Prior calibration: anchor-based refinement
branch_portfolio.hypothesis: Anchor-based calibration against LB history will close the val_prior_fusion (0.662) to val_probe (0.665) gap, yielding a net positive when fused.
branch_portfolio.rationale: Post-parity consideration card identifies the Bayesian prior as close but not optimal. Prior calibration policy is conditional — this branch provides evidence for promotion or relegation.
branch_portfolio.falsification_criterion: Calibrated prior fusion score does not improve over 0.662 on the same holdout split.
branch_portfolio.kill_criterion: Calibration introduces regression below 0.65 on any holdout metric.

branch_portfolio.title: Probe diagnostic: fitted vs active class count
branch_portfolio.hypothesis: Inspecting probe output dimensions will reveal whether fitted_class_count >= active_class_count, resolving the conditional probe_head and class_coverage policy states.
branch_portfolio.rationale: Open question from research stage. Answer is required before any coverage or threshold-tuning branch can be safely proposed. Low cost, high diagnostic value.
branch_portfolio.falsification_criterion: N/A — diagnostic branch produces a measurement, not a score comparison.
branch_portfolio.kill_criterion: Probe output cannot be loaded or dimensions are unreadable.

open_questions: What is the fitted_class_count vs active_class_count for the run-0001 probe head?
Does the current code produce a submission-ready CSV, or does the bundle need new inference glue code?
What is the expected LB score range given 0.665 local validation?

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: Second complementary probe head adds ensemble signal

probe_head: Embedding-head models add complementary signal.
top_negative_vetoes: class_coverage: Past regression from round 3 — avoid without evidence.
submission_bar: Raw perch baseline without iteration is rejected.
